title: 10-Night Dining Planner

currentNight.description: 1-based index of the current night in the 10-night trip.

nights.description: Exactly 10 nights of dining options and selections.

dining.description: Featured dining room (e.g., Normandie, Tuscan, Cosmopolitan, Cyprus) or any other venue name like 'Sushi on 5' or 'Oceanview Cafe'. May be null if not set.

tags.description: Map of 'menuType + delimiter + itemName' to a menu item selection object. Delimiter can be '||' or double line break '\n\n'.

sigCustom.description: Per-night custom items for Signature (SIG) when menus vary nightly.

exclCustom.description: Global custom items (exclusive/miscellaneous) that users add if menus change.

clsCustom.description: Global custom items for the Classic (CLS) menu.

sigCustom.description: Optional global custom items for the Signature (SIG) menu (present in some datasets).

menuItem.description: User selection metadata for a specific menu item.

diners.description: Names of diners who desire this item.

feat.description: If true, diner wants to feature/eat this item at some point during the trip.

customBuckets.description: Buckets for user-added menu items by course. Each entry can be a plain string (item name) or an object with name and variant.

customItem.description: A custom menu item, either a simple name (string) or an object with name and variant code.

description: Schema for a 10-night dining planner that mixes nightly-changing Signature (SIG) items and five static nightly menus (CLS, Normandie, Tuscan, Cosmopolitan, Cyprus), with user tagging/feature flags and custom additions.
